content: Phase 1: Build complete backend (auth, onboarding, chips, games, announcements, notifications, admin, maintenance)
Phase 1: POC test script — 37/37 checks green
Phase 2: Design guidelines + full player app + admin panel
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
Bug fix: implement real gameplay for all 18 games (server engines + play UIs) — verified by testing agent 100%
Master Prompt 1 restructure (RBAC, MFA, double-entry ledger, maker/checker, audit chain) — awaiting user answers to clarifying questions
SendGrid/SMTP email integration when user provides credentials
